DatasetArn.note: When dependent op needs 'DatasetArn' param, use for_each=aws.comprehend.list_datasets and set DatasetArn='{{ item.DatasetArn }}'

DocumentClassifierArn.note: When dependent op needs 'DocumentClassifierArn' param, use for_each=aws.comprehend.list_document_classifiers and set DocumentClassifierArn='{{ item.ClassifierMetadata }}'

EndpointArn.note: When dependent op needs 'EndpointArn' param, use for_each=aws.comprehend.list_endpoints and set EndpointArn='{{ item.CurrentInferenceUnits }}'

EntityRecognizerArn.note: When dependent op needs 'EntityRecognizerArn' param, use for_each=aws.comprehend.list_entities_detection_jobs and set EntityRecognizerArn='{{ item.EntityRecognizerArn }}'

FlywheelArn.note: When dependent op needs 'FlywheelArn' param, use for_each=aws.comprehend.list_flywheels and set FlywheelArn='{{ item.ActiveModelArn }}'

FlywheelIterationId.note: When dependent op needs 'FlywheelIterationId' param, use for_each=aws.comprehend.list_flywheel_iteration_history and set FlywheelIterationId='{{ item.FlywheelIterationId }}'

JobId.note: When dependent op needs 'JobId' param, use for_each=aws.comprehend.list_document_classification_jobs and set JobId='{{ item.DataAccessRoleArn }}'

ResourceArn.note: When dependent op needs 'ResourceArn' param, use for_each=aws.comprehend.list_tags_for_resource and set ResourceArn='{{ item.Key }}'

DescribeDataset.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.DatasetProperties.*

DescribeDocumentClassificationJob.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.DocumentClassificationJobProperties.*

DescribeDocumentClassifier.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.DocumentClassifierProperties.*

DescribeEntityRecognizer.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.EntityRecognizerProperties.*

DescribeEventsDetectionJob.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.EventsDetectionJobProperties.*

DescribeFlywheel.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.FlywheelProperties.*

DescribeFlywheelIteration.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.FlywheelIterationProperties.*

DescribeKeyPhrasesDetectionJob.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.KeyPhrasesDetectionJobProperties.*

DescribePiiEntitiesDetectionJob.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.PiiEntitiesDetectionJobProperties.*

DescribeResourcePolicy.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly
